message:
style(vdbe): refactor try_emit_complex_in_subquery for idiomatic patterns

Cleanup pass on the complex IN subquery codegen:

- Replace match-with-None/Err patterns with let-else bindings:
  - from_clause: match from.as_ref() -> let Some(...) else
  - table: match find_table() -> let Ok(...) else

- Remove redundant & in emit_expr call: &expr -> expr
  (expr is already a reference)

- Consolidate fall-through Goto emission:
  Move the final Goto to no_match_label outside the if/else branches
  since both paths need it. Reduces code duplication.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
